data.body: Investigation (debug-everything 2026-04-27): .github/required-checks.txt does not exist in the current branch HEAD (worktree-20260427-084003). The file and all associated scripts (provision-ruleset.sh, validate-required-checks.sh) are being developed on worktree-20260427-101014. Commit 9f51e3b3bd on that branch already has the correct version of required-checks.txt that explicitly excludes consuming-project ci-dso-staged.yml entries with a clear comment. No fix needed in this branch — will be resolved when worktree-20260427-101014 is merged.
